title: cenchrus nervosus
intro: Cenchrus nervosus, also known as the Indian sandbur or the naked brome, is a type of grass native to tropical Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Cenchrus nervosus include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
